name: posthog-setup
title: Setup a deep PostHog integration
description: Automatically instrument your project with PostHog event tracking, user identification, and error tracking

content.text:
Setup automatic PostHog event tracking in this project.

Use the `integration` skill from the PostHog skills bundle and follow its reference files in order, starting with `references/1-begin.md`. The skill ships the full four-step workflow (begin → edit → revise → conclude) plus framework-specific example code and documentation.

Use these MCP resources alongside the skill:
- {{docs.frameworks}} - Integration documentation per framework
- {{examples}} - Example projects with known-good PostHog integrations

Implement a deep PostHog integration following the skill's workflow.
I'll set up PostHog event tracking in your project using the integration skill's step-by-step workflow.
